meta.title: Earth Day 2026 — Every Day is Earth Day
meta.description: Earth Day 2026. Every day is Earth Day. Except today — today is something even better.

facts: Did you know? 100% of Earths contain Ella.
Fun fact: all oxygen on Earth is downstream of one specific person.
Scientists agree: the planet is 3.7% more radiant on April 22nd.
Bees do a little dance. It's about Ella.
The Sun rises every 24 hours just to check in on her.

act1.headline: Happy Earth Day 2026
act1.pitch: Take the pledge. Plant a tree. Save a planet. Make today count — because the Earth only gets one of these a year.
ticker: Every 60 seconds, a minute passes. Also, a forest is lost.
Your carbon footprint is smaller than your impact.
The ocean is 71% water. The other 29% is plastic. (Not really. Mostly water.)
Sponsored by: The Sky, The Sea, and one specific girl.

stats.label: Of people care about the planet

act3.title: Happy ELLA Day
act3.sub: Every day is Earth Day. Except today.
act3.tagline: Today is the day the planet ties for second.
act3.credit: A small interactive thing, made with way too much care by Chad, for Ella.

act4.title: Plant a Wish Garden
act4.sub: Tap each seed to plant a wish. Watch it bloom.

seeds.bud: A year full of quiet mornings and loud laughs.
Every sunrise biased slightly in your favour.
Enough courage for the scary things. Enough softness for the rest.
Coffee that's always the right temperature.
Every plane you take, landing safely. Every timezone we share, shrinking.

act5.title: Earth vs Ella
act5.sub: An extremely scientific comparison. Tap a card to flip.

ella.v: too many km from me this week

act6.title: Build her bouquet
act6.sub: Tap the flowers. Add them to the ribbon.
act6.done: A whole bouquet. Wrapped in a ribbon. Brought to you by the internet.

act7.title: Happy Ella Day
letter: The Earth gets one day a year, and it has to share with you.
I don't know how oceans and forests and entire atmospheres feel about that, but they can deal.
You are the best thing about this little planet. Long distance is just geography — you're closer than any km would suggest.
Have the softest, loudest, sunniest, most you day. I'm so proud of you. I'm so lucky.
